resources.string: DNS tunnel — emergency fallback when standard protocols are unavailable.
VPS requirements: ≥512 MB RAM, 1 vCPU, ≥1 GB disk, port 53/UDP open
Port 53 is already in use: owner %1$s, address %2$s, protocol %3$s. Free the port and try again.
Port 53 is already in use on the server: %1$s. Free the conflict and try again.
Port 53/UDP is already in use on the server. Free the port and try again.
Insufficient resources: need ≥512 MB RAM and ≥1 GB free disk.
Failed to install Docker. Check internet access on the server.
Server package manager is busy (apt-get lock). Wait for updates to finish and try again.
sudo is not installed on the server. Install sudo and add the user to sudoers.
User requires a password for sudo. Configure NOPASSWD in sudoers.
User is not permitted in /etc/sudoers. Grant sudo rights.
User home directory is inaccessible. Check directory permissions.
User is not in the sudo/wheel group. Add them: usermod -aG sudo user.
Image build failed. Check the server\'s internet connection.
MasterDNS server binary was not found in the release asset or installer output. Try again later; if it repeats, install the server manually and share the deploy log.
Failed to extract encryption key from the container.
Authentication error. Check your login and password.
Could not connect to server. Check the IP address and SSH port.
Port 53 is used by Amnezia DNS

The server has an "amnezia-dns" container using DNS port 53. MasterDNS cannot continue installation while this container is active. You can cancel deploy or safely remove only this container and continue installation.
Deploy was cancelled because of the amnezia-dns container.
Failed to remove the amnezia-dns container.
